## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `grimoire ...`
2. Press ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Terminal: [e.g. iTerm2, Alacritty, kitty]
- Grimoire version: [e.g. v0.1.0]
- Go version (if built from source): [e.g. 1.24.2]
